title: 5 pts
content:
5 pts
This criterion is linked to a Learning OutcomeRough Draft: Supporting Points
10 pts
Full Credit
Offered three distinct, relevant, and well-articulated supporting points or arguments that substantiate and reinforce the main thesis or idea presented.
5 pts
Partial Credit
Offered 2 distinct, relevant, and well-articulated points or arguments the support and reinforce the main thesis presented.
0 pts
No Credit
Offered fewer than 2 distinct, relevant, and well-articulated supporting points or arguments that substantiate and reinforce the main thesis or idea presented.
10 pts
This criterion is linked to a Learning OutcomeRough Draft : Body Paragraphs, Topic Sentence
20 pts
Full Credit
Body of the text is structured using paragraphs. Each starts with a clear and focused topic sentence.
10 pts
Partial Credit
At least half of the essay body of the text is structured using paragraphs. Most start with a clear and focused topic sentence, while others need some work.
5 pts
context: From document: Weeks 1 - 6 Canvas Data Dump — chunk 60 (chunk 60/188)
